children.label: a
children.text: Except as otherwise provided by law, appropriations made under this chapter shall be subject to annual authorization.

children.label: b
children.text: Authorization of appropriations to the Commission shall reflect the need for effective licensing and other regulation of the nuclear power industry in relation to the growth of such industry.
